code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut start = -1

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      sum = sum + v * 2
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

print("result=#{sum}")
